form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start set the pace for much of the race 2nd in a small field at this track Bm76 on March 28 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Magic Defense with 59.5kg at $4.20. Before that won by a long-neck at Colac Colac Cup February 6 over 2000m defeating Gregolimo with 54kg at $2.30. Rates highly after a strong run last time.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 57-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 10 at Canterbury Bm78 on February 13 over 1900m, 22 len behind Centenario with 59kg at $26. Before that sat on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at Canterbury Cg&E Bm72 on January 23 over 1550m, slow going 5 len behind Apuntar with 59.5kg at $21. Expect improvement on recent effort.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months eased back early on 3rd in a small field at this track Hcp on March 28 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Rewards And More with 55kg at $4. Previously second-up of 16 at Flemington Bm74 on August 2 over 1200m, 8 len behind De Bergerac with 58kg at $10. Fitter again and a winning hope.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run ran on from midfield and won by a nose at this track Bm76 March 15 over 1600m defeating Valley Prince with 54kg at $3.70. The race before that came from midfield and won by 2.25 len at this track 0 - 64 March 7 over 1600m defeating Starton with 54.5kg at $4.40. Won last start and is well-placed again.

form.formComment: Comes off a 62 day let-up. Most recently rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd in a small field at Sunshine Coast Bm68 on February 8 over 1800m, 0.6 len behind Ring Bearer with 55.5kg at $3.90. The start before that struggled in the run home; 7th of 12 at Doomben Bm65 on January 29 over 2050m, 8 len behind Livalittle with 57.5kg at $21. Shouldn't trouble the top few.
